Bug / Task Description: Histogram.CumulativeBelow undercounts at boundaries. When a bucket's bound is exactly equal to the requested bound, that bucket's observations are excluded from the cumulative total, so the function stops one bucket too early. The documented behavior is to return the count of all observations at or below the given bound, inclusive of the bucket whose bound equals the argument. Fix the accumulation so the boundary bucket is included.
Commit Subject: fix(histogram): CumulativeBelow must include the boundary bucket
